meaning: n.几何学者,尺蠖(一种虫子,行动时身体弯成弧状,象用大拇指和中指量距离,故冠以"尺"字)
examples: Investigations in Shanghai reveal that three generation of euonymus geometer occur inthe course of a year, with the pupa surviving the winter underground.
Pythagoras, who is remembered for his theorem about the sides of a right-angled triangle, lived around 540 BC, while Euclid, the best known geometer of the ancient world, lived around 300 BC.
